title: Playoff race tightens as contenders trade late-season blows
description: A packed slate reshaped the standings and sharpened the Western Conference playoff picture.

title: Coaches lean on smaller lineups ahead of the postseason
description: Rotation experiments are accelerating as teams search for defensive flexibility and late-game spacing.

title: Rookie guards are changing second-unit offense around the league
description: Several contenders are getting a lift from young playmakers who can push pace and stabilize bench scoring.

title: Injury updates could swing seeding battles this week
description: Key returns and day-to-day decisions are likely to reshape matchups across both conferences.

title: Transition offense remains the easiest path to efficient scoring
description: League tracking data continues to show the gap between early-clock opportunities and half-court creation.

title: Front offices keep one eye on draft assets during the stretch run
description: The final weeks are forcing teams to balance playoff urgency against longer-term roster flexibility.
